---
title: "Executive Committee"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
toc: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
tibble::tribble(
  ~role, ~name, ~university, ~start, ~end,
  "Chair", "Christopher Hawkins", "University of Central Florida", 2022, 2024,
  "Chair-Elect", "David Swindell", "Arizona State University", 2022, 2024,
  "Past Chair", "Christine Palus", "Villanova University", 2020, 2022,
  "Executive Committee", "Jayce Farmer", "University of Nevada, Las Vegas", 2020, 2023,
  "Executive Committee", "Meghan Rubado", "Cleveland State University", 2020, 2023,
  "Executive Committee", "David Swindell", "Arizona State University", 2020, 2023,
  "Executive Committee", "Qian Hu", "University of Central Florida", 2019, 2025,
  "Executive Committee", "Steve Percy", "Portland State University", 2019, 2022,
  "Executive Committee", "Anne Williamson", "University of Missouri–Kansas City", 2021, 2024,
  "Executive Committee", "Kimberly Nelson", "University of North Carolina", 2021, 2024,
  "Executive Committee", "Benoy Jacob", "University of Wisconsin–Madison", 2021, 2024,
  "Executive Committee", "Sung-Wook Kwon", "Texas Tech University", 2022, 2025,
  "Executive Committee", "Chris Goodman", "Northern Illinois University", 2022, 2025
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(role = factor(role, levels = c("Chair", "Chair-Elect", "Past Chair", "Executive Committee"))) |>
  dplyr::group_by(role) |>
  dplyr::arrange(start, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = c(name, university)
  ) |>
  gt::cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(start, end)
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    name = gt::md("**Name**"),
    university = gt::md("**University**"),
    start = gt::md("**Start**"),
    end = gt::md("**End**")
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(
    label = gt::md("**Term**"),
    columns = c(start, end)
  ) |>
  gt::cols_width(
    start ~ gt::pct(15),
    end ~ gt::pct(15)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = gt::cells_row_groups(groups = c("Chair", "Chair-Elect", "Past Chair", "Executive Committee"))
  ) |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(75)
  ) |>
  gt::opt_horizontal_padding(scale = 1.5)
```

## Appointed by the Chair
Treasurer
: Susan Paddock, University of Wisconsin – Madison


## Other Section Leaders

Newsletter Editor/Social Media and Blog Coordinator
: Elizabeth Motyka, University of Illinois at Chicago

Editors, State and Local Government Review
: Kimberly Nelson, University of North Carolina – Chapel Hill
: Eric Zeemering, University of Georgia
